response.overview: Kele Handa is a 1953 Sri Lankan film directed by B. A. W. Jayamanne. The film stars Rukmani Devi,  Stanley Perera, Rita Ratnayake,  B. A. W. Jayamanne, Eddie Jayamanne, Mabel Blythe,  Millie Kahandawala,  Wimala Kumari, Udula Dabare. Released on 27 May. First movie based on aSinhalanovel. The film was produced in Sri Lanka.
response.title: Kele Handa
